---
title: "Generalized linear mixed model"
subtitle: "outlet-specific effects"
author: "Szymon Talaga"
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY | HH:mm:ss (Z)"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-location: left
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  cache: false
  daemon: false
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 350px
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
---

```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from project import paths
from newsuse.data import DataFrame

FOCAL_EPOCHS = pd.Series([4, 8, 11], name="epoch")
```

```{python}
types = (
    DataFrame.from_(paths.dataset, columns=["key", "name", "quality", "type"])
    .merge(DataFrame.from_(paths.epochs))
    .groupby(["epoch", "quality", "name"])["type"]
    .value_counts(normalize=True)
    .sort_index()
    .unstack("type", fill_value=0.0)
    .drop(columns=["music", "reshare", "status"])
    .assign(visual=lambda df: df["photo"] + df["video"])
)
```

```{python}
emm = DataFrame.from_(paths.proc / "outlets-emm.xlsx").ffill()

outlets_include = (
    emm.groupby("name")["epoch"]
    .apply(lambda s: FOCAL_EPOCHS.isin(s).all())
    .pipe(lambda s: s[s])
    .index
    .tolist()
)

emm = emm[emm["name"].isin(outlets_include)].reset_index(drop=True)
```

```{python}
e11e4 = (
    emm
    .set_index(["epoch", "quality", "name"])["reactions"]
    .groupby(["quality", "name"])
    .apply(lambda s: s[11] / s[4])
    .reset_index(level=(0, 1), drop=True)
)
```

```{python}
x = (
    emm.set_index(["epoch", "quality", "name"])["reactions"]
    .xs("the new republic", level="name")
    .droplevel("quality")
)

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.plot(x.index, x)
ax.set_yscale("log")
```

## Post type effects

```{python}
(
    emm
    .merge(types.reset_index())
    .set_index(["epoch", "quality", "name"])
    .drop(columns=["n"])
    .groupby(["quality", "name"])
    .apply(
        lambda s: pd.Series(
            [s[8] / s[4], s[11] / s[4], s[11] / s[8]],
            index=pd.Series(["8 / 4", "11 / 4", "11 / 8"], name="contrast"),
            name="ratio",
        )
    )
    .pipe(lambda s: s.droplevel(["quality", "name"]))
    # .pipe(lambda s: pd.concat(s.tolist(), keys=s.index))
    # .reset_index()
    # .merge(types, left_on=["epoch", "quality", "name"], right_index=True)
)
```
